# Optional example only — do NOT edit this file to use the package.
# In chat, paste your full LFR source directly in the message.

Example (paste something like this in chat):

module mux2(
    finput a, b,
    control sel,
    foutput y
);
flow tmp;
distribute@(sel) begin
  if (sel == 1'b0) tmp <= a;
  else tmp <= b;
end
assign y = tmp;
endmodule
